mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.0 percent signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in housing starts and retail sales indicate a broad contraction in consumer demand that reduces corporate revenue expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint decline signal yields a positive return frequency above 58% over a 60-day horizon in backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a late-cycle expansion reflects capacity utilization nearing limits, prompting inflation expectations that trigger short-term equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in more than 65% of observations when INDPRO increases during late-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rates above 5.0 percent impose high financing costs on leveraged firms and suppress risk appetite, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal produces a positive return frequency exceeding 60% when FEDFUNDS remains above 5.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening that supports consumer income and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined labor strength signal yields negative returns in over 55% of cases during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in real gross domestic product reflect expanding economic output that boosts corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency falls below 52% during GDP expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 100 indicates a contraction in manufacturing activity that signals imminent earnings downgrades, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in more than 62% of observations when INDPRO drops below the 100 threshold.
